'''Hurikane''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. It was inhabited by a [[Unidentified Hurikane species|species of sentient beings]] made of stone and [[Color/Legends|purple]] [[Hurrikaine crystal]]s, who were almost insectoid in appearance.

In [[58 BBY/Legends|58 BBY]], a young [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] named [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] was [[Mission to Hurikane|sent]] to Hurikane to negotiate with these beings and possibly obtain some of the crystals. After events went poorly, several of the natives gave chase to Windu. During the chase, one of his pursuers fell into a canyon and was shattered. Having realized the error of his ways, the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] apprentice healed the being's broken body by piecing it back together with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. In gratitude, Mace was given some of the Hurrikaine crystals from the being's own body, which he used to create his purple [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] blade.

==Behind the scenes==
"Hurrikaine" crystals appear in [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords|''Knights of the Old Republic II'']] and possess many of the attributes associated with Mace Windu's lightsaber, including its purple color. While not officially confirmed, it is logical to assume that Hurrikaine crystals come from Hurikane, despite the spelling discrepancy.
